mapper.select: SELECT a.content_id, a.title, NULLIF(concat_ws(' ', a.addr1, a.addr2), '') AS address, a.latitude, a.longitude, coalesce(image.public_url, a.first_image1, a.first_image2) AS thumbnail_url, coalesce(ct.content_type_name, 'UNKNOWN') AS category, a.overview, a.tel, a.source_modified_at FROM tourism_source.attractions a LEFT JOIN tourism_source.contenttypes ct ON ct.content_type_id = a.content_type_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT ai.public_url FROM tourism_source.attraction_images ai WHERE ai.attraction_no = a.no AND ai.is_active = true ORDER BY ai.display_order ASC, ai.created_at ASC LIMIT 1 ) image ON true WHERE CAST(a.content_id AS text) = #{contentId} LIMIT 1
